Press Release · 新聞稿 · March 17, 2026
重塑製造業的未來
We Are Reshaping Manufacturing
Markforged × Intellengine · World's First Metal + Composite · FX10 · Booth 8C15
📍 上海國家會展中心 · 2026年3月17–19日
TCT Asia 2026 · 第12屆

中文新聞稿

Markforged 攜手 Intellengine 亮相 TCT Asia 2026
FX10「雙材智造」引爆現場，重塑製造業格局

全球數位製造解決方案領導品牌 Markforged，今日正式亮相第十二屆 TCT 亞洲展（TCT Asia 2026），攜手中國大陸授權代理商 Intellengine（上海睿淮工業裝備有限公司） 聯合參展，展位設於 8.1 館 8C15，以旗艦設備 FX10 為核心，以「World's First：金屬 + 複合材料，雙材智造」為主軸，向逾四萬名業界人士現場展示工業製造的未來。

「我們正在重塑製造業。」

MARKFORGED · TCT ASIA 2026 · BOOTH 8C15 · SHANGHAI
World's First 金屬 + 複合材料 雙材智造 FX10 Digital Manufacturing Booth 8C15 Intellengine

展位以極具視覺衝擊力的大型 FX 字型主牆為核心，搭配 Markforged 標誌性黑底黃牌設計語言，橫跨 FX10 設備實機展示、工業應用零件陣列、全系列產品陳列，以及「全域極限場景，即時即地智造」與「Advanced Composites 3D Printer」雙語標牌，完整呈現品牌從材料科技到工廠現場的製造能力。

現場洽談區座無虛席，來自製造業、航空航太、汽車、國防等多個領域的工程師與採購決策者持續駐足，與 Intellengine 及 Markforged 團隊深度交流，展現市場對高效能工業增材製造解決方案的高度需求。

FX10 是全球首款可在同一機台上切換金屬與複合材料列印模組的工業級 3D 列印平台，搭配 Onyx™ 等高性能工業複材，協助製造業者在工廠一線即時生產強韌、精密的工具、治具與功能性零件，大幅縮短交期，提升供應鏈韌性。

現場實拍 — Markforged × Intellengine · TCT Asia 2026 · Shanghai · Booth 8C15 · March 17, 2026
FX booth · FX10 World's First · 複合材料應用件 · Advanced Composites 3D Printer

English Press Release

Markforged and Intellengine Showcase the Future of Digital Manufacturing at TCT Asia 2026

Shanghai, March 17, 2026 — Markforged, a global leader in digital manufacturing solutions, made a bold statement at TCT Asia 2026 — the Asia-Pacific region's premier additive manufacturing exhibition at NECC Shanghai. In partnership with its authorized mainland China distributor, Intellengine (Shanghai Ruihe Industrial Equipment Co., Ltd.), Markforged exhibited at Booth 8C15, Hall 8.1, centering the showcase on the FX10 — the world's first industrial 3D printing platform combining metal and composite capabilities in a single system.

The booth made an immediate visual impact with a large-format "FX" identity wall set against Markforged's signature black-and-yellow palette. Flanked by bilingual taglines — "World's First · 金屬+複合材料，雙材智造" and "全域極限場景，即時即地智造 / Advanced Composites 3D Printer" — the space drew continuous crowds of engineers, procurement managers, and industry leaders eager to experience the platform firsthand.

The FX10's unique modular architecture allows users to switch seamlessly between metal and composite printing, enabling factory-floor production of strong, accurate tools, fixtures, and functional parts on demand. Paired with Intellengine's local technical service expertise, Markforged continues its mission to advance digital manufacturing transformation across Greater China.

TCT Asia 2026 welcomed 550+ exhibitors across 55,000 m² — the largest edition in the event's 12-year history — with over 40,000 visitors expected across three days.
